suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify backend/API scope boundaries for TUI milestones: either enforce no backend changes or explicitly allow minimal API/store updates required to satisfy notification-center assertions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md marks src/api/admin.ts and src/gateway/ as DO NOT TOUCH, but feature f-notification-center changed both files to implement required behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Ensure referenced worker skill IDs exist and are available to workers before mission execution (or default unresolved skillName to a known valid worker profile).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: features.json assigns skillName=worker for implementation feature(s), but repository .factory/skills was empty and reviewer noted skill resolution failure.

rejectedObservations.observation: Expected shared architecture reference file is missing from project library.
